scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=chrome116 --outfile=dist/background.js && esbuild src/content-script-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=chrome116 --outfile=dist/content.js && esbuild src/popup-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --platform=browser --target=chrome116 --outfile=dist/popup-entry.js && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && node scripts/verify-build-output.mjs
scripts.dev: echo "Chrome extension dev workflow is not implemented yet"
